name: Maglir
bio:
Physical Appearance: Bosmer (Wood Elf) male wearing iron armor and wielding an iron shortsword. Also owns lower-class clothing - a dark green shirt, laced leather pants, and stitched leather shoes.
Race: Bosmer
Personality Keywords: knight, attitude problem, complaining, excuse-maker, guild member, mercenary, disloyal
Role: Maglir is a knight and new recruit to the Fighters Guild with a notable attitude problem. He has a guild assignment in Skingrad but spends most of his time at the West Weald Inn, complaining that the pay isn't worth the effort and claiming he has "a family to think about" as justification. He knows standard knight spells and carries a small amount of gold. He is known among guild members as "the OTHER bottom boot" and eventually leaves to join the Blackwood Company.
Home Location Information: Initially found at the West Weald Inn in Skingrad during his guild assignment. He later appears in Anvil, Bravil, and Leyawiin throughout the Fighters Guild questline.
Daily Routine: During his Skingrad assignment, Maglir spends most of his time at the West Weald Inn rather than completing his duties.
Personality - The Unmotivated Knight: Maglir has a significant attitude problem and frequently makes excuses for not doing his work. He complains about pay and uses his family as justification for his lack of dedication. His poor attitude and work ethic are known among other guild members, and his dissatisfaction eventually leads him to betray the Fighters Guild by joining the rival Blackwood Company.
author: Bethesda
